name: 스마트스토어 기본 대표이미지
global_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, banner, multiple products, collage, blurry, low quality, distorted, extra objects, busy background, cluttered, advertisement style, price tag, discount sticker, border, frame

presets.name: 화이트 배경 기본형
presets.description: 순백의 배경에 상품을 명확하게 표현하는 기본형. 가장 범용적이며 스마트스토어 기본 기준에 적합.
presets.template: Professional product photography of {product} on a clean {background} background, centered composition, studio lighting, {shadow} shadow, {spacing} margins, minimalist e-commerce style, high detail, sharp focus, product catalog quality

presets.name: 소프트 그림자형
presets.description: 자연스러운 그림자로 입체감을 강조. 상품에 depth감을 부여해 실물감 향상.
presets.template: Product photography of {product} with {shadow} on {background} surface, {angle} perspective, soft natural lighting from upper-left, clean minimal background, {spacing} composition, commercial photography quality, product identity clear

presets.name: 프리미엄 미니멀형
presets.description: 고급스럽고 절제된 미니멀 스타일. 여백을 넓게 활용해 프리미엄 브랜드 톤 구현.
presets.template: Premium product showcase of {product}, {background} backdrop, {angle} perspective, {prop}, luxury minimalist composition, high-end commercial photography, precise controlled lighting, {spacing} negative space, editorial quality, brand identity

presets.name: 감성 배경 최소형
presets.description: 라이프스타일 감성을 최소한으로 연출. 텍스처 배경을 활용해 따뜻한 분위기 연출.
presets.template: Lifestyle product photography of {product}, {background} context, {angle}, {prop}, warm natural lighting, clean and airy composition, {spacing} framing, modern minimal aesthetic, inviting atmosphere, high quality detail

presets.name: 디스플레이 스탠드형
presets.description: 받침대나 스탠드를 활용한 구조적 연출. 상품이 돋보이는 깔끔한 카탈로그 스타일.
presets.template: Clean product display of {product} positioned on {prop}, {background} background, {angle} camera angle, professional studio lighting, {shadow} shadow effect, {spacing} composition, sharp product detail, clean catalog photography style
